signals.raw:
Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Ahead of 8 p.m. Deadline, Conditional on Strait of Hormuz Opening | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump announced a ceasefire with Iran just before an 8 p.m. ET deadline on April 7, 2026, stating it is subject to Iran reopening the Strait of Hormuz, amid prior failed talks and escalating threats of strikes on civilian infrastructure.[1]
